description: Mid-level Frontend Engineer · Web and Mobile with 4+ years shipping products in React, React Native, and TypeScript. I work on high-traffic corporate systems, international apps, and microfrontend architectures with REST/GraphQL integrations. MBA in Frontend Engineering (FIAP). I support backend work with Node and NestJS when necessary.

aboutMe.title: About Me
aboutMe.description: My first contact with programming was in 2015, with a Minecraft server that reached 90 simultaneous players. After high school, I looked for a field that combined creativity and impact — in 2019 I found that in technology. Since then I've worked on real products: from consultancy with 15+ projects and ~3k daily visits to corporate ERP and international mobile apps. Today I balance production delivery with continuous learning (FIAP MBA in Frontend Engineering), focusing on front-end architecture, performance, accessibility, and user experience.
